item.title: Bangalore to Makalidurga Trek: One-Day Trekking Guide for Couples, Friends, and Families
item.description: Makalidurga is one of the most rewarding and beginner-friendly trekking destinations near Bangalore. Located just 60 km from the city, this beautiful hill offers a perfect one-day getaway for bikers, couples, families, and anyone looking to experience nature without venturing too far. With its ancient hill
item.dc:creator: Karthik Kumar D K

item.title: How to Charge Your Phone With Solar Power at Home
item.description: As the world shifts toward renewable energy, solar power is becoming an increasingly practical and eco-friendly way to charge everyday devices—especially mobile phones. Whether you're off the grid, on a camping trip, or simply looking
item.dc:creator: Karthik Kumar D K

item.title: Solo Everest Base Camp Trek, Bangalore to Kathmandu then to Salleri

item.title: 4-Day Solo Trip to Gokarna: Beaches, Temples & Itinerary
item.description: You are planning to visit Gokarna solo then here is the article which will help you to plan your trip. And this plan in this article is for three days and four nights and for a person who wants to travel solo. If you are traveling from
item.dc:creator: Karthik Kumar D K

item.title: Dal Bhat Recipe - Nepali Style
item.description: Dal Bhat or Nepali Dal Bhat, is a dish made of lentils and rice, actually It is considered that this is the national dish of Nepal. Generally the rice is either boiled or steamed and It is served in the middle of the dish and surrounded by the dal or lentils and sometimes with some other curries or chutney or with a pickle. For people, Dal Bhat is easy to cook and it can be cooked with
item.dc:creator: Reddamma D

item.title: Everest Base Camp Trek, Start Trekking from Salleri and back to Salleri
item.description: If you are planning to prepare to trek Everest Base Camp by yourself, then this article would help you to get a picture of where you can start your trek. I have read through many articles and videos and found the best route for trekking.
item.dc:creator: Karthik Kumar D K

item.title: Solo Everest Base Camp Trek, What to pack?
item.description: If you are planning to prepare to trek Everest Base Camp by yourself, then this article would help you to get a picture of what you might need to pack in your backpack. Packing proper equipment, clothing and quick energy foods will help you to do your trek bit smoothly. One more important thing, is this plan would fit for the people who are willing to trek solo (without a porter), so wh
item.dc:creator: Karthik Kumar D K

item.title: Everest Base Camp Trek - What should you know before you start?
item.description: If you are planning to prepare to trek Everest Base Camp by yourself, then this article would help you to get a picture of what to know before you proceed further. The Everest Base Camp Trek is a challenging and rewarding adventure that takes you to the base of the highest mountain in the world. Here are some things you should know before you start: Physica
item.dc:creator: Karthik Kumar D K
